full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Generated a structured report with all required sections in markdown format.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Draft a 4-page report for an MKL reproduction project covering: paper summary, reproduction setup/results, ablation findings, failure mode, and reflection.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated a structured report with all required sections in markdown format.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Edited for tone, added honest caveats, and ensured all claims are supported by notebook results.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Refined the paper summary section of the report.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Summarise the key contributions of Gonen and Alpaydin (2011) in 3-4 sentences suitable for a technical report introduction.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated a concise summary covering the MKL taxonomy, the alternating optimisation framework, and the empirical evaluation across benchmark datasets.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified all cited contributions against the paper's abstract and conclusion sections.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How should I structure the methodology section of the report to clearly explain my toy MKL reproduction setup?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested subsections for: dataset description, kernel dictionary, optimisation procedure, evaluation metrics, and computational environment.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Reorganised the section to follow this structure and added specific parameter values.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Drafted the limitations and reflection section.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Write a reflection paragraph discussing the limitations of reproducing MKL on a toy dataset compared to the paper's full-scale experiments.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated a thoughtful reflection covering scale differences, kernel dictionary size, and the gap between toy and benchmark performance.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Strengthened the honesty of the reflection and added concrete numbers from my experiments.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Formatted tables and figures for the report.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Generate markdown tables comparing MKL accuracy with baseline SVM and ablation results, suitable for a technical report.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided formatted markdown tables with headers for method, accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Populated tables with actual numbers from notebook outputs and added captions.
